error: op_host/max_reduction_over_a_dimension_custom_qbjmwkkwjrbfhjbe20260310031153.cpp:59:56: error: ‘const struct gert::Shape’ has no member named ‘GetOriginShape’
summary: InferShapeContext returns gert::Shape directly in this environment, so calling GetOriginShape() on context->GetInputShape(0) causes a host compile error. In InferShape, read the input as const gert::Shape* and use GetDimNum()/GetDim() directly instead of the TilingContext shape access pattern.
